def _quiescence(self, alpha, beta, ply):
        """Quiescence search: only captures and promotions."""
        board = self.board
        info = self.info

        info.nodes += 1
        self._check_time()
        if info.stopped:
            return 0

        if ply > info.seldepth:
            info.seldepth = ply

        stand_pat = evaluate(board)

        if stand_pat >= beta:
            return beta

        # Delta pruning
        BIG_DELTA = PIECE_VALUES[QUEEN] + 200
        if stand_pat + BIG_DELTA < alpha:
            return alpha

        if stand_pat > alpha:
            alpha = stand_pat

        moves = gen_captures(board)
        # Simple ordering: MVV-LVA
        scored = []
        for move in moves:
            to_sq = move_to(move)
            from_sq = move_from(move)
            victim_mb = board.mailbox[to_sq]
            attacker_mb = board.mailbox[from_sq]
            victim_pt = victim_mb & 7 if victim_mb else PAWN
            attacker_pt = attacker_mb & 7 if attacker_mb else PAWN
            score = PIECE_VALUES[victim_pt] * 10 - PIECE_VALUES[attacker_pt]
            if is_promotion(move):
                score += 5000
            scored.append((score, move))
        scored.sort(reverse=True)

        for _, move in scored:
            # SEE-like delta pruning
            to_sq = move_to(move)
            victim_mb = board.mailbox[to_sq]
            if victim_mb:
                capture_value = PIECE_VALUES[victim_mb & 7]
            elif move_flags(move) == 5:  # EP
                capture_value = PIECE_VALUES[PAWN]
            else:
                capture_value = 0

            if stand_pat + capture_value + 200 < alpha and not is_promotion(move):
                continue

            board.make_move(move)
            if board.is_attacked(board.king_sq[board.side ^ 1], board.side):
                board.unmake_move()
                continue

            score = -self._quiescence(-beta, -alpha, ply + 1)
            board.unmake_move()

            if info.stopped:
                return 0

            if score >= beta:
                return beta
            if score > alpha:
                alpha = score

        return alpha

chess-ruby-cc.snippet:
def quiescence(ply, alpha, beta)
      @nodes += 1

      if (@nodes & (CHECK_INTERVAL - 1)) == 0
        if @time_manager.hard_time_up?
          @stop = true
          return 0
        end
      end

      in_check = @board.in_check?

      if in_check
        stand_pat = -INFINITY
      else
        stand_pat = Evaluation.evaluate(@board)
        return stand_pat if stand_pat >= beta
        return alpha if stand_pat + 975 < alpha # Delta pruning
        alpha = stand_pat if stand_pat > alpha
      end

      if in_check
        moves = MoveGenerator.generate(@board)
      else
        moves = MoveGenerator.generate(@board, captures_only: true)
      end

      order_moves_qsearch(moves)
      legal_count = 0

      moves.each do |move|
        if !in_check && move.capture?
          captured_val = PIECE_VALUES[ChessEngine.piece_type(move.captured)] || 0

          # Delta pruning per move
          if stand_pat + captured_val + 200 < alpha
            next unless move.promotion?
          end

          # SEE pruning: skip losing captures
          attacker_val = PIECE_VALUES[ChessEngine.piece_type(move.piece)] || 0
          if attacker_val > captured_val
            next if Attack.see(@board, move) < 0
          end
        end

        next unless @board.make_move_if_legal(move)
        legal_count += 1

        score = -quiescence(ply + 1, -beta, -alpha)
        @board.unmake_move(move)

        return 0 if @stop

        if score > alpha
          alpha = score
          return alpha if score >= beta
        end
      end

chess-ruby-codex.snippet:
def quiescence(position, alpha, beta, deadline_ms, ply, qply)
      return 0 if stopped_or_timed_out?(deadline_ms)

      if position.in_check?(position.side_to_move)
        evasions = position.legal_moves
        return -MATE_SCORE + ply if evasions.empty?
        return alpha if qply >= QUIESCENCE_MAX_PLY

        ordered_moves(position, evasions, ply: ply, tt_move: nil).each do |move|
          break if stopped_or_timed_out?(deadline_ms)

          child = position.make_move(move)
          score = -quiescence(child, -beta, -alpha, deadline_ms, ply + 1, qply + 1)
          return 0 if @timed_out
          return beta if score >= beta

          alpha = [alpha, score].max
        end

        return alpha
      end

Fixpoint quiesce (pos : Position) (alpha beta : int) (qdepth : nat) : int :=
  match qdepth with
  | O => evaluate pos
  | S qdepth' =>
    let stand_pat := evaluate pos in
    if leb beta stand_pat then stand_pat
    else
      (* Delta pruning: if even capturing a queen can't raise us to alpha, give up *)
      if ltb (add stand_pat delta_margin) alpha then stand_pat
      else
        let a := if ltb alpha stand_pat then stand_pat else alpha in
        let captures := gen_capture_moves pos in
        let fix go (mvs : list Move) (cur_a : int) (fuel : nat) : int :=
          match fuel with
          | O => cur_a
          | S fuel' =>
            match mvs with
            | nil => cur_a
            | m :: rest =>
              let new_pos := make_move pos m in
              let score := negate_score (quiesce new_pos (negate_score beta) (negate_score cur_a) qdepth') in
              if leb beta score then score
              else
                let na := if ltb cur_a score then score else cur_a in
                go rest na fuel'
            end
          end
        in go captures a 256%nat
  end.

let rec quiescence ctx pos alpha beta qdepth ply =
  should_stop ctx;
  let stand = evaluate pos in
  if qdepth <= 0 then stand
  else if stand >= beta then beta
  else
    let a = ref (max alpha stand) in
    let caps = order_moves pos (legal_capture_moves pos) in
    let rec loop = function
      | [] -> !a
      | m :: tl ->
          let captured = E.make_move pos m in
          let score = - (quiescence ctx pos (-beta) (- !a) (qdepth - 1) (ply + 1)) in
          E.unmake_move pos m captured;
          if score >= beta then beta
          else (
            if score > !a then a := score;
            loop tl)
    in
    loop caps

partial def quiescence (pos : Position) (alpha beta : Int) (ply qDepth : Nat) : (Int × Nat) :=
  if pos.halfmove >= 100 then
    (0, 1)
  else if qDepth = 0 then
    (eval pos, 1)
  else
    let legal := legalMoves pos
    if legal.isEmpty then
      if isInCheck pos pos.sideToMove then
        (-MATE + Int.ofNat ply, 1)
      else
        (0, 1)
    else if isInCheck pos pos.sideToMove then
      Id.run do
        let mut a := alpha
        let mut best : Int := -INF
        let mut nodes : Nat := 1
        for m in orderMoves pos legal do
          let (childScore, childNodes) :=
            quiescence (makeMove pos m) (-beta) (-a) (ply + 1) (qDepth - 1)
          nodes := nodes + childNodes
          let score := -childScore
          if score > best then
            best := score
          if score > a then
            a := score
          if a >= beta then
            return (beta, nodes)
        return (best, nodes)
    else
      let standPat := eval pos
      if standPat >= beta then
        (beta, 1)
      else
        Id.run do
          let mut a := if standPat > alpha then standPat else alpha
          let mut best := standPat
          let mut nodes : Nat := 1
          let tactical := legal.filter (fun m => isTacticalMove pos m)
          for m in tactical do
            let gainBound := tacticalGainUpperBound pos m
            if standPat + gainBound + QDeltaMargin < a then
              pure ()
            else
              let (childScore, childNodes) :=
                quiescence (makeMove pos m) (-beta) (-a) (ply + 1) (qDepth - 1)
              nodes := nodes + childNodes
              let score := -childScore
              if score > best then
                best := score
              if score > a then
                a := score
              if a >= beta then
                return (beta, nodes)
          return (best, nodes)

LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 L-ALPHA                PIC S9(9) COMP-5.
       01 L-BETA                 PIC S9(9) COMP-5.
       01 L-SS.
          COPY "copybooks/searchstate.cpy".
       01 L-OUT                  PIC S9(9) COMP-5.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING GAME-STATE L-ALPHA L-BETA L-SS L-OUT.
           IF SS-STOP = 1
               MOVE 0 TO L-OUT
               GOBACK
           END-IF

           ADD 1 TO SS-NODES
           IF SS-TIME-LIMIT-CS > 0
               SUBTRACT 1 FROM SS-TIME-CHECK
               IF SS-TIME-CHECK <= 0
                   MOVE 2048 TO SS-TIME-CHECK
                   CALL "TIMEUTIL" USING NOW-CS
                   COMPUTE ELAPSED = NOW-CS - SS-START-CS
                   IF ELAPSED >= SS-TIME-LIMIT-CS
                       MOVE 1 TO SS-STOP
                       MOVE 0 TO L-OUT
                       GOBACK
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-IF

           CALL "EVAL" USING GAME-STATE STANDPAT
           IF STANDPAT >= L-BETA
               MOVE L-BETA TO L-OUT
               GOBACK
           END-IF
           IF STANDPAT > L-ALPHA
               MOVE STANDPAT TO L-ALPHA
           END-IF

           *> Delta pruning: if even a queen gain can't raise alpha, skip captures.
           IF (STANDPAT + 950) < L-ALPHA
               MOVE L-ALPHA TO L-OUT
               GOBACK
           END-IF

           MOVE 1 TO CAP-ONLY
           CALL "MOVEGEN" USING GAME-STATE LS-LIST CAP-ONLY

           *> Score captures (MVV-LVA) for quiescence ordering
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > ML-COUNT OF LS-LIST
               PERFORM SCORE-Q-MOVE
           END-PERFORM

           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > ML-COUNT OF LS-LIST OR SS-STOP = 1
               PERFORM PICK-BEST-Q

               MOVE ML-FROM OF LS-LIST(I)  TO M-FROM OF LS-MOVE
               MOVE ML-TO OF LS-LIST(I)    TO M-TO OF LS-MOVE
               MOVE ML-PROMO OF LS-LIST(I) TO M-PROMO OF LS-MOVE
               MOVE ML-FLAGS OF LS-LIST(I) TO M-FLAGS OF LS-MOVE
               MOVE 0 TO M-SCORE OF LS-MOVE

               CALL "MAKEMOVE" USING GAME-STATE LS-MOVE OK
               IF OK = 1
                   MOVE 0 TO CHILD-SCORE
                   COMPUTE CHILD-ALPHA = 0 - L-BETA
                   COMPUTE CHILD-BETA  = 0 - L-ALPHA
                   CALL "QUIESCE" USING GAME-STATE CHILD-ALPHA CHILD-BETA L-SS CHILD-SCORE
                   COMPUTE CHILD-SCORE = 0 - CHILD-SCORE
                   CALL "UNMAKEMOVE" USING GAME-STATE LS-MOVE

                   IF SS-STOP = 1
                       MOVE 0 TO L-OUT
                       GOBACK
                   END-IF

                   IF CHILD-SCORE > L-ALPHA
                       MOVE CHILD-SCORE TO L-ALPHA
                       IF L-ALPHA >= L-BETA
                           MOVE L-BETA TO L-OUT
                           GOBACK
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           MOVE L-ALPHA TO L-OUT
           GOBACK.

chess-icon-codex.snippet:
procedure quiescence(pos, alpha, beta, ply)
  local stand, moves, m, child, score

  g_nodes +:= 1
  if out_of_time() = 1 then {
    g_abort_search := 1
    return evaluate(pos)
  }

  stand := evaluate(pos)
  if stand >= beta then return beta
  if stand > alpha then alpha := stand

  moves := generate_pseudo_moves(pos, 1)
  order_moves(pos, moves, ply, &null)

  every m := !moves do {
    child := apply_move(pos, m)
    if /child then next

    score := -quiescence(child, -beta, -alpha, ply + 1)
    if g_abort_search = 1 then return 0

    if score >= beta then return beta
    if score > alpha then alpha := score
  }

  return alpha
end

  \evaluate
  \mm@standpat=\evalscore\relax

  \else

  \fi
}

let rec alpha_beta si (b : Bridge.board) alpha_in beta depth ply pv pv_len =
  si.nodes <- si.nodes + 1;
  pv_len.(0) <- 0;
  if si.stop then 0
  else begin
    (* Check for repetition *)
    let hash = Zobrist.hash_board b in
    if ply > 0 && (is_repetition si hash || b.half_moves >= 100) then 0
    else if depth <= 0 then
      quiescence si b alpha_in beta 32
    else begin
      let alpha = ref alpha_in in
      let side = b.side in
      let opp = 1 - side in
      let in_check = Bridge.is_attacked b b.king_sq.(side) opp in
      let effective_depth = if in_check then depth + 1 else depth in

      (* TT probe *)
      let tt_move = ref 0 in
      (match Tt.probe hash with
       | Some entry ->
         tt_move := entry.tt_move;
         if entry.tt_depth >= depth then begin
           let tt_score = Tt.score_from_tt entry.tt_score ply in
           match entry.tt_flag with
           | Tt.Exact ->
             if ply > 0 then begin
               pv.(0) <- entry.tt_move;
               pv_len.(0) <- 1;
               (* Return exact score directly - this is the main TT speedup *)
               alpha := tt_score;
               (* We set a flag to return this score - but we need to be careful *)
             end
           | Tt.LowerBound ->
             if tt_score > !alpha then alpha := tt_score
           | Tt.UpperBound ->
             if tt_score < beta then () (* can't do beta cutoff here easily,
                                           just use the move ordering benefit *)
         end
       | None -> ());

      (* Early TT cutoff for non-PV nodes *)
      let tt_cutoff = ref false in
      (match Tt.probe hash with
       | Some entry when entry.tt_depth >= depth && ply > 0 ->
         let tt_score = Tt.score_from_tt entry.tt_score ply in
         (match entry.tt_flag with
          | Tt.Exact ->
            pv.(0) <- entry.tt_move;
            pv_len.(0) <- 1;
            tt_cutoff := true;
            alpha := tt_score
          | Tt.LowerBound when tt_score >= beta ->
            tt_cutoff := true;
            alpha := beta  (* will return beta *)
          | Tt.UpperBound when tt_score <= alpha_in ->
            tt_cutoff := true
            (* alpha stays at alpha_in, will return alpha_in *)
          | _ -> ())
       | _ -> ());

      if !tt_cutoff then !alpha
      else begin
        (* Null move pruning *)
        let null_pruned = ref false in
        if not in_check && depth >= 3 && !alpha > (-29000) then begin
          let old_ep = b.ep_square in
          let old_side = b.side in
          let old_ply = b.ply in
          b.ep_square <- (-1);
          b.side <- 1 - b.side;
          b.ply <- b.ply + 1;
          let dummy_pv = Array.make 128 0 in
          let dummy_pvl = Array.make 1 0 in
          push_hash si hash;
          let null_score = -(alpha_beta si b (-beta) (-beta + 1) (depth - 3) (ply + 1) dummy_pv dummy_pvl) in
          pop_hash si;
          b.side <- old_side;
          b.ep_square <- old_ep;
          b.ply <- old_ply;
          if null_score >= beta then
            null_pruned := true
        end;

        if !null_pruned then beta
        else begin
          let ml = Bridge.create_move_list () in
          Bridge.generate_all_moves b ml;
          let scores = Array.make 256 0 in
          let use_ply = if ply >= 0 && ply < 128 then ply else 0 in
          for i = 0 to ml.ml_count - 1 do
            scores.(i) <- score_move si b ml.ml_from.(i) ml.ml_to.(i) ml.ml_flag.(i) use_ply
          done;
          (* Boost TT move score *)
          if !tt_move <> 0 then begin
            for i = 0 to ml.ml_count - 1 do
              let enc = encode_move ml.ml_from.(i) ml.ml_to.(i) ml.ml_flag.(i) in
              if enc = !tt_move then scores.(i) <- 20000
            done
          end;
          sort_moves ml scores;

          let best_score = ref (-31000) in
          let best_move = ref 0 in
          let legal_moves = ref 0 in
          let child_pv = Array.make 128 0 in
          let child_pv_len = Array.make 1 0 in
          let i = ref 0 in
          while !i < ml.ml_count && not si.stop do
            let mf = ml.ml_from.(!i) in
            let mt = ml.ml_to.(!i) in
            let mfl = ml.ml_flag.(!i) in
            if Bridge.is_legal_move b mf mt mfl then begin
              incr legal_moves;
              let undo = Bridge.make_move b mf mt mfl in
              push_hash si hash;
              (* LMR *)
              let search_depth = ref (effective_depth - 1) in
              if !legal_moves > 4 && not in_check && mfl = 0 && effective_depth >= 3 then
                search_depth := effective_depth - 2;
              let score = ref (-(alpha_beta si b (-beta) (- !alpha) !search_depth (ply + 1) child_pv child_pv_len)) in

LINKAGE SECTION.
       COPY "copybooks/types.cpy".
       01 L-MAX-DEPTH            PIC S9(4) COMP-5.
       01 L-TIME-LIMIT-CS        PIC S9(18) COMP-5.
       01 L-BESTMOVE.
          05 M-FROM               PIC S9(4) COMP-5.
          05 M-TO                 PIC S9(4) COMP-5.
          05 M-PROMO              PIC S9(4) COMP-5.
          05 M-FLAGS              PIC S9(4) COMP-5.
          05 M-SCORE              PIC S9(9) COMP-5.
       01 L-OUT-SCORE            PIC S9(9) COMP-5.
       01 L-OUT-NODES            PIC S9(18) COMP-5.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING GAME-STATE L-MAX-DEPTH L-TIME-LIMIT-CS L-BESTMOVE L-OUT-SCORE L-OUT-NODES.
           MOVE 0 TO SS-NODES SS-STOP
           MOVE L-TIME-LIMIT-CS TO SS-TIME-LIMIT-CS
           MOVE 2048 TO SS-TIME-CHECK
           CALL "TIMEUTIL" USING SS-START-CS

           IF SS-TT-INIT NOT = 1
               PERFORM VARYING TT-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL TT-I > TT-SIZE
                   MOVE -1 TO TTE-KEY(TT-I)
               END-PERFORM
               MOVE 1 TO SS-TT-INIT
               MOVE LOW-VALUES TO SS-HEUR
           END-IF
           *> Keep heuristics across moves; clear on init/reset calls (depth <= 0).
           IF L-MAX-DEPTH <= 0
               MOVE LOW-VALUES TO SS-HEUR
           END-IF

           MOVE 0 TO BM-FROM BM-TO BM-PROMO BM-FLAGS BM-SCORE
           MOVE 0 TO LAST-BEST-SCORE
           MOVE 0 TO L-OUT-SCORE

           PERFORM VARYING DEPTH FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL DEPTH > L-MAX-DEPTH OR SS-STOP = 1
               *> Principal variation move from previous iteration
               MOVE BM-FROM  TO PV-FROM
               MOVE BM-TO    TO PV-TO
               MOVE BM-PROMO TO PV-PROMO
               MOVE BM-FLAGS TO PV-FLAGS

               *> Root aspiration window (helps reach deeper depths at same time)
               IF DEPTH >= 3
                   MOVE 50 TO ASP-WINDOW
                   COMPUTE ASP-ALPHA = LAST-BEST-SCORE - ASP-WINDOW
                   COMPUTE ASP-BETA  = LAST-BEST-SCORE + ASP-WINDOW

                   MOVE ASP-ALPHA TO ALPHA
                   MOVE ASP-BETA  TO BETA
                   PERFORM ROOT-SEARCH

                   *> Re-search with full window on fail-high/low
                   IF SS-STOP = 0 AND (BEST-SCORE <= ASP-ALPHA OR BEST-SCORE >= ASP-BETA)
                       COMPUTE ALPHA = 0 - INF-SCORE
                       MOVE INF-SCORE TO BETA
                       PERFORM ROOT-SEARCH
                   END-IF
               ELSE
                   COMPUTE ALPHA = 0 - INF-SCORE
                   MOVE INF-SCORE TO BETA
                   PERFORM ROOT-SEARCH
               END-IF

               *> Time up: keep the previous iteration's best move/score (more stable)
               IF SS-STOP = 1
                   IF PV-FROM NOT = 0
                       MOVE PV-FROM  TO BM-FROM
                       MOVE PV-TO    TO BM-TO
                       MOVE PV-PROMO TO BM-PROMO
                       MOVE PV-FLAGS TO BM-FLAGS
                   END-IF
                   MOVE LAST-BEST-SCORE TO BEST-SCORE
               ELSE
                   *> No legal move => game over
                   IF ROOT-LEGAL-COUNT = 0
                       MOVE 0 TO BM-FROM BM-TO BM-PROMO BM-FLAGS
                       MOVE 0 TO BEST-SCORE
                   ELSE
                       MOVE BEST-SCORE TO LAST-BEST-SCORE
                   END-IF
               END-IF

               *> info line for completed depth (or partial if time ran out)
               MOVE BM-FROM  TO M-FROM OF L-BESTMOVE
               MOVE BM-TO    TO M-TO OF L-BESTMOVE
               MOVE BM-PROMO TO M-PROMO OF L-BESTMOVE
               MOVE BM-FLAGS TO M-FLAGS OF L-BESTMOVE
               MOVE 0        TO M-SCORE OF L-BESTMOVE

               MOVE BEST-SCORE TO L-OUT-SCORE
               MOVE SS-NODES   TO L-OUT-NODES

               CALL "MOVE2UCI" USING L-BESTMOVE UCI-BUF
               MOVE DEPTH TO DEPTH-DISP
               MOVE SS-NODES TO NODES-DISP
               MOVE BEST-SCORE TO SCORE-DISP
               DISPLAY
                   "info depth " FUNCTION TRIM(DEPTH-DISP)
                   " nodes " FUNCTION TRIM(NODES-DISP)
                   " score cp " FUNCTION TRIM(SCORE-DISP)
                   " pv " FUNCTION TRIM(UCI-BUF)
           END-PERFORM

           MOVE BM-FROM  TO M-FROM OF L-BESTMOVE
           MOVE BM-TO    TO M-TO OF L-BESTMOVE
           MOVE BM-PROMO TO M-PROMO OF L-BESTMOVE
           MOVE BM-FLAGS TO M-FLAGS OF L-BESTMOVE
           MOVE 0        TO M-SCORE OF L-BESTMOVE

           MOVE BEST-SCORE TO L-OUT-SCORE
           MOVE SS-NODES   TO L-OUT-NODES
           GOBACK.

def test_worker_reuses_transposition_table_on_repeated_search(self) -> None:
        responses = run_worker_session(
            [
                "position startpos",
                "go depth 2",
                "debug searchstats",
                "go depth 2",
                "debug searchstats",
                "quit",
            ]
        )
        self.assertEqual(responses[0], "ok")
        self.assertRegex(responses[1], r"^bestmove [a-h][1-8][a-h][1-8][qrbn]?$")
        first_stats = parse_stats_line(responses[2])
        self.assertEqual(first_stats["mode"], "depth")
        self.assertEqual(first_stats["target_depth"], "2")
        self.assertEqual(first_stats["depth"], "2")
        self.assertEqual(first_stats["abort"], "0")

        self.assertRegex(responses[3], r"^bestmove [a-h][1-8][a-h][1-8][qrbn]?$")
        second_stats = parse_stats_line(responses[4])
        self.assertEqual(second_stats["mode"], "depth")
        self.assertEqual(second_stats["target_depth"], "2")
        self.assertEqual(second_stats["depth"], "2")
        self.assertEqual(second_stats["abort"], "0")

        self.assertLessEqual(int(second_stats["nodes"]), int(first_stats["nodes"]))

lean-chess.snippet:
def pieceSquareValue (piece : Piece) (isEndgame : Bool) (sq : Square) : Int :=
  let c := centrality sq
  let adv := Int.ofNat (forwardRank piece.color sq)
  let edgePenalty := if isEdgeSquare sq then 1 else 0
  match piece.kind with
  | .pawn =>
      adv * 6 + c * 2
  | .knight =>
      c * 12 - Int.ofNat edgePenalty * 18 + adv
  | .bishop =>
      c * 6 + adv * 2
  | .rook =>
      c * 2 + adv * 2
  | .queen =>
      c * 3 + adv
  | .king =>
      if isEndgame then
        c * 9 + adv * 2
      else
        kingCastledBonus piece.color sq - c * 7 - adv * 8

% chess-engine.tex -- A chess engine in pure pdfLaTeX (by Claude Code and Mathieu Acher)
% No Lua, no external programs for logic.
% Uses \count registers 200-263 for the 8x8 board.
% Piece encoding: 0=empty, 1=wP, 2=wN, 3=wB, 4=wR, 5=wQ, 6=wK
%                 negatives for black (-1=bP, -2=bN, etc.)

\makeatletter

%% ========================================================
%% Step 1: Board Representation & Coordinates
%% ========================================================

% Square index: (rank-1)*8 + file, where file a=1..h=8, rank 1..8
% So a1=1, b1=2, ..., h1=8, a2=9, ..., h8=64
% Stored in \count registers 200..263 (square index i -> \count\numexpr199+i\relax)

% Set a square value: \setsq{index}{value}
\def\setsq#1#2{\global\count\numexpr199+#1\relax=#2\relax}

% Get a square value (expandable): \getsq{index}
\def\getsq#1{\the\count\numexpr199+#1\relax}

% Precompute file and rank lookup tables for all 64 squares.
% \numexpr division ROUNDS (not truncates), so we use \divide (which truncates).
\count190=1\relax
\loop\ifnum\count190<65
  \count191=\count190\relax \advance\count191 by -1\relax % 0-based index
  \count192=\count191\relax \divide\count192 by 8\relax   % rank 0-based (truncating)
  \count193=\count192\relax \multiply\count193 by 8\relax
  \count194=\count191\relax \advance\count194 by -\count193\relax % file 0-based
  \advance\count192 by 1\relax % rank 1-based
  \advance\count194 by 1\relax % file 1-based
  \expandafter\edef\csname sq@file@\the\count190\endcsname{\the\count194}%
  \expandafter\edef\csname sq@rank@\the\count190\endcsname{\the\count192}%
  \advance\count190 by 1\relax
\repeat

% Precompute mirror table for PST: mirror(sq) = (8-rank)*8+file
% Used for black pieces: look up PST from white's perspective with mirrored square
\count190=1\relax
\loop\ifnum\count190<65
  \count191=\csname sq@file@\the\count190\endcsname\relax  % file 1-8
  \count192=\csname sq@rank@\the\count190\endcsname\relax  % rank 1-8
  % mirror rank: 9-rank
  \count193=\numexpr(9-\count192-1)*8+\count191\relax
  \expandafter\edef\csname sq@mirror@\the\count190\endcsname{\the\count193}%
  \advance\count190 by 1\relax
\repeat

% Pawn PST (sq 1-64, a1=1, rank 1 at bottom)

-- eval.sql: Static position evaluation
-- Score from white's perspective (positive = white advantage)
-- Components: material balance + piece-square table bonuses + center control

WITH
pos AS (
    SELECT board, side FROM position LIMIT 1
),

-- Evaluate each square
square_eval AS (
    SELECT
        s.sq,
        s.rank AS r,
        s.file AS f,
        substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1) AS piece,
        COALESCE(pv.value, 0) AS mat_value,
        -- PST bonus: for white pieces use sq directly, for black pieces mirror vertically
        COALESCE(
            CASE
                WHEN substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1) BETWEEN 'A' AND 'Z' THEN
                    (SELECT bonus FROM pst WHERE pst.piece = UPPER(substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1)) AND pst.sq = s.sq)
                WHEN substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1) BETWEEN 'a' AND 'z' THEN
                    -(SELECT bonus FROM pst WHERE pst.piece = UPPER(substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1)) AND pst.sq = (7 - s.rank) * 8 + s.file)
                ELSE 0
            END, 0
        ) AS pst_bonus
    FROM squares s, pos p
    LEFT JOIN piece_value pv ON pv.piece = substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1)
    WHERE substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1) != '.'
),

-- Center control bonus: pieces controlling center squares (d4,d5,e4,e5 = sq 27,28,35,36)
center_bonus AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN piece BETWEEN 'A' AND 'Z' AND sq IN (27, 28, 35, 36) THEN 10
            WHEN piece BETWEEN 'a' AND 'z' AND sq IN (27, 28, 35, 36) THEN -10
            WHEN piece BETWEEN 'A' AND 'Z' AND sq IN (18,19,20,21,26,29,34,37,42,43,44,45) THEN 5
            WHEN piece BETWEEN 'a' AND 'z' AND sq IN (18,19,20,21,26,29,34,37,42,43,44,45) THEN -5
            ELSE 0
        END
    ), 0) AS bonus
    FROM square_eval
)

SELECT
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(mat_value), 0) FROM square_eval) +
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pst_bonus), 0) FROM square_eval) +
    (SELECT bonus FROM center_bonus)
    AS score;

BOARD-MAKE-MOVE.
           IF B-PLY >= MAX-PLY
               EXIT PARAGRAPH
           END-IF

           ADD 1 TO B-PLY
           MOVE ENCODED-MOVE TO U-MOVE(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-ZOBRIST-KEY TO U-ZOBRIST(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-PAWN-KEY TO U-PAWN-KEY(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-CASTLING-RIGHTS TO U-CASTLING(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-EP-SQUARE TO U-EP-SQUARE(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-HALF-MOVE TO U-HALF-MOVE(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-FULL-MOVE TO U-FULL-MOVE(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-PST-MG TO U-PST-MG(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-PST-EG TO U-PST-EG(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-PHASE TO U-PHASE(B-PLY)

           PERFORM MOVE-DECODE
           MOVE FROM-SQ TO ORIG-FROM-SQ
           MOVE TO-SQ TO ORIG-TO-SQ
           MOVE MOVED TO ORIG-MOVED

           ADD 1 TO B-HALF-MOVE

           IF B-EP-SQUARE NOT = -1
               COMPUTE FILE-I = FUNCTION MOD(B-EP-SQUARE, 8) + 1
               COMPUTE B-ZOBRIST-KEY = B-ZOBRIST-KEY B-XOR Z-EP-KEY(FILE-I)
           END-IF
           MOVE -1 TO B-EP-SQUARE
           COMPUTE B-ZOBRIST-KEY =
               B-ZOBRIST-KEY B-XOR Z-CASTLING-KEY(B-CASTLING-RIGHTS + 1)

           EVALUATE MOVE-TYPE
               WHEN MOVE-CASTLING
                   MOVE ORIG-MOVED TO MOVED
                   MOVE ORIG-FROM-SQ TO FROM-SQ
                   MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
                   PERFORM BOARD-MOVE-PIECE

                   IF B-SIDE-TO-MOVE = WHITE
                       MOVE WR TO MOVED
                   ELSE
                       MOVE BR TO MOVED
                   END-IF

                   IF ORIG-TO-SQ > ORIG-FROM-SQ
                       COMPUTE FROM-SQ = ORIG-TO-SQ + 1
                       COMPUTE TO-SQ = ORIG-TO-SQ - 1
                   ELSE
                       COMPUTE FROM-SQ = ORIG-TO-SQ - 2
                       COMPUTE TO-SQ = ORIG-TO-SQ + 1
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM BOARD-MOVE-PIECE
                   MOVE 0 TO B-HALF-MOVE

               WHEN MOVE-EN-PASSANT
                   IF B-SIDE-TO-MOVE = WHITE
                       COMPUTE TO-SQ = ORIG-TO-SQ - 8
                       MOVE BP TO MOVED
                   ELSE
                       COMPUTE TO-SQ = ORIG-TO-SQ + 8
                       MOVE WP TO MOVED
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM BOARD-REMOVE-PIECE

                   MOVE ORIG-MOVED TO MOVED
                   MOVE ORIG-FROM-SQ TO FROM-SQ
                   MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
                   PERFORM BOARD-MOVE-PIECE
                   MOVE 0 TO B-HALF-MOVE

               WHEN MOVE-PROMOTION
                   IF CAPTURED NOT = MOVE-NO-PIECE
                       MOVE CAPTURED TO MOVED
                       MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
                       PERFORM BOARD-REMOVE-PIECE
                   END-IF

                   MOVE ORIG-MOVED TO MOVED
                   MOVE ORIG-FROM-SQ TO TO-SQ
                   PERFORM BOARD-REMOVE-PIECE

                   IF B-SIDE-TO-MOVE = WHITE
                       COMPUTE MOVED = PROMO + 1
                   ELSE
                       COMPUTE MOVED = 6 + PROMO + 1
                   END-IF
                   MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
                   PERFORM BOARD-PUT-PIECE
                   MOVE 0 TO B-HALF-MOVE

               WHEN OTHER
                   IF CAPTURED NOT = MOVE-NO-PIECE
                       MOVE CAPTURED TO MOVED
                       MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
                       PERFORM BOARD-REMOVE-PIECE
                       MOVE 0 TO B-HALF-MOVE
                   END-IF

                   MOVE ORIG-MOVED TO MOVED
                   MOVE ORIG-FROM-SQ TO FROM-SQ
                   MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
                   PERFORM BOARD-MOVE-PIECE

                   IF FUNCTION MOD(ORIG-MOVED, 6) = 0
                       MOVE 0 TO B-HALF-MOVE
                       IF FUNCTION ABS(ORIG-TO-SQ - ORIG-FROM-SQ) = 16
                           COMPUTE B-EP-SQUARE = (ORIG-FROM-SQ + ORIG-TO-SQ) / 2
                           COMPUTE FILE-I = FUNCTION MOD(B-EP-SQUARE, 8) + 1
                           COMPUTE B-ZOBRIST-KEY =
                               B-ZOBRIST-KEY B-XOR Z-EP-KEY(FILE-I)
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
           END-EVALUATE

           MOVE ORIG-FROM-SQ TO FROM-SQ
           MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
           PERFORM UPDATE-CASTLING-RIGHTS
           COMPUTE B-ZOBRIST-KEY =
               B-ZOBRIST-KEY B-XOR Z-CASTLING-KEY(B-CASTLING-RIGHTS + 1)
